previous-work.title: RF Software Engineer
descriptions: Developed and optimised Python-based software for technical validation of hotspot devices, reducing validation time by 50%.
Spearheaded the implementation of coding standards and lead a comprehensive refactoring initiative, enhancing software scalability and maintainability.
Added calibration support for new RF equipment.
Wrote extensive documentation for users and developers of the software environment, reducing onboarding time from 6 to 3 days.

previous-work.title: Undergraduate Physics Teaching Assistant (PHYS 131)
descriptions: Conducted weekly workshops for undergraduate students to solidify understanding of complex physics problems.
Delivered concise lectures about waves and basic hydrostatics to ensure material comprehension.
Provided one-on-one assistance during office hours, assessing individual learning needs and reinforcing key concepts.
